mapper.select: SELECT a.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, c.course_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT a.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, c.course_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC, a.id DESC

SELECT a.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, c.course_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC

SELECT a.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, c.course_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY a.attendance_date DESC

SELECT a.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, c.course_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.course_id = #{courseId} AND a.attendance_date = #{attendanceDate} ORDER BY a.id

SELECT a.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_no, c.course_name FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN course c ON a.course_id = c.id WHERE a.student_id = #{studentId} AND a.course_id = #{courseId} AND a.attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (student_id, course_id, attendance_date, attendance_time, status, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{attendanceTime}, #{status}, #{remark})
